name: 00-components

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && NODE_ENV=production babel src/components --out-dir dist --copy-files --ignore __tests__,spec.js,test.js,__snapshots__

description: This project was bootstrapped with [Create React App](https://github.com/facebook/create-react-app).
